summary: All 9 CRITICAL and 8 WARNING issues from Codex Round 2 adversarial review have been fixed and verified by test_app.py tests.

agreed_issues.fix: Added FIXTURES_DIR = Path(__file__).parent.parent / 'fixtures' and multi-path fallback lookup
Added 'demo': config.app.get('demo_mode', False) to response JSON

agreed_issues.issue: Missing API token validation in production mode
agreed_issues.fix: Added @app.before_request hook with hmac.compare_digest() token validation for /api/* routes
Added @app.route('/') with HTML response containing 'NetDash' and demo badge
Changed return to jsonify(result), 202 to return 202 Accepted status
Added @app.after_request hook with 5 security headers: CSP, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, Cache-Control
Removed standalone get_db_path(), get_raw_outputs_path(), get_max_concurrent(), get_uplink_threshold() functions (kept as Config methods only)

agreed_issues.issue: _parse_outputs() using hasattr() unreliably instead of get_parser()
agreed_issues.fix: Replaced hasattr() logic with try/except calling parsers.get_parser(vendor) directly
Added GET /api/switches endpoint returning list of switches

agreed_issues.issue: Netmiko timeout parameter should be 'conn_timeout', not 'timeout'
agreed_issues.fix: Changed device dict key from 'timeout' to 'conn_timeout' for netmiko ConnectHandler

agreed_issues.issue: IP validation using manual split/int parsing instead of ipaddress module
agreed_issues.fix: Replaced manual validation with ipaddress.IPv4Address() and proper exception handling

agreed_issues.issue: Parsers call utils.log_event() but function missing from parsers/utils.py
agreed_issues.fix: Added log_event(level, event, **kwargs) function to core/parsers/utils.py

agreed_issues.issue: Import errors with relative imports (from ..config import get_config)
agreed_issues.fix: Changed to absolute imports: from config import get_config

agreed_issues.issue: FIXTURES_DIR lookup failed in test context
agreed_issues.fix: Added multi-location fallback: FIXTURES_DIR, Path('fixtures'), Path.cwd()/fixtures

agreed_issues.issue: Vendor names (cisco, arista) don't match parser expectations (cisco_ios, arista_eos)
agreed_issues.fix: Updated YAML vendor fields: cisco→cisco_ios, arista→arista_eos

agreed_issues.issue: Demo mode doesn't load demo data into database
agreed_issues.fix: Added run_demo(config) call in create_app when config.app.get('demo_mode') is True

agreed_issues.issue: Tests call init_db() but implementation has init_schema()
agreed_issues.fix: Added init_db() as backward-compatible alias to init_schema()

recommendations: All CRITICAL and WARNING issues from Round 2 are now fixed
test_app.py demonstrates compliance with security, API design, and error handling requirements
